pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly defines this path, and setup_sumo.sh maps the real data to this exact location.
Task instruction explicitly requires the demand file to be created at this path.
Task instruction explicitly requires the configuration file to be created at this path.
Task instruction explicitly requires the tripinfo file to be generated at this path.
Task instruction explicitly requires the calculated average wait time to be saved at this path.
Task instruction explicitly requires exactly 20 taxis to be created.
Task instruction explicitly requires exactly 50 persons to be created.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real-world Bologna Pasubio traffic simulation data. The network file exists at the expected path and contains 100 valid standard edges for taxis and passengers. All required output file paths (demand, config, tripinfo, analysis) correctly match the explicit instructions. The counts of 20 taxis and 50 persons are explicitly demanded by the instructions. No true expected wait time exists in the dataset, as it depends entirely on the agent's random route generation within the scenario.
